raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box or the cup; sufficient lateral clearance exists to apply gentle stabilizing contact.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is laterally stabilized to prevent sliding/rotation while the left arm prepares to engage."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the lighter box remains adjacent but does not block side contact; the cup is not in the arms' sweep path.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted clear of the tabletop (no longer resting on the table)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box or the cup; sufficient lateral clearance exists to apply gentle stabilizing contact.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is laterally stabilized to prevent sliding/rotation while the left arm prepares to engage.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the lighter box remains adjacent but does not block side contact; the cup is not in the arms' sweep path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted clear of the tabletop (no longer resting on the table).
